text:
And I need 3 hookers a bag of chips and 3 6 packs of beer. And yes I know

update x to y as it's ready being done you just have to be patient. As
ports are volunteer work not paid so it's at the super bottom of my "shits
to give"

Saying that please close this ticket as IM will get updated when I get off
like mentioned on IRC.
